name: audit
description: Audit/review-gate profile: define scope, gather evidence, run focused review lanes, fix or explicitly waive blockers, and stop only after quorum or documented residual risk.
default_done_when: Review quorum is clear, all P0/P1 blockers are fixed or explicitly waived, validation evidence is recorded, and residual risk is documented.
safety_notes: Never claim audit completion from self-review alone.
Any P0/P1 finding blocks the gate until fixed or explicitly waived.
Keep reviewer artifacts under the target repo root .ai/plan and .ai/reviews paths.
